problem id: 2b16044a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01001001 -> 01101100
  01010101 -> 10000010
  01010100 -> 10001010
  10000001 -> 01001000
  00011000 -> 11001100
  11011111 -> 10010111
  11011110 -> 10011111
  11010111 -> 11010011
  00001010 -> 01010101

query: 11001111
predicted answer: 00011111
